servinfo.title: Front Brake Caliper Removal and Installation

item.ptxt: Be careful not to damage front brake flexible hoses.
Never depress brake pedal during service operation shown below.
Check for leakage of brake fluid when removing front brake pads and repair front brake caliper if leakage is found.
Replace all front brake pads at the same time even if only one pad is defective.
Do not reuse front brake flexible hose gaskets. Otherwise, brake fluid may leak.

s1.ptxt: Hoist vehicle and remove front wheel.
Place a container below front brake caliper to catch brake fluid.
Remove flexible hose joint bolt (1) from front brake caliper (2).
Remove front brake caliper pin bolts (1).
Remove front brake caliper from front brake caliper carrier.

attention2.ptxt: Do not twist front brake flexible hose when installing front brake caliper.

s1.ptxt: Install front brake caliper to front brake caliper carrier.
Tighten caliper pin bolts (1) to specified torque.
Connect front brake flexible hose (1) with new flexible hose gaskets (2) to front brake caliper (3) as shown in figure. Tighten flexible hose joint bolt to specified torque.

torqueitem.t-part: Front brake flexible hose joint bolt

s1.ptxt: Fill reservoir with brake fluid and bleed air from brake system.
Make sure there is no leakage of the brake fluid.
Make sure that brake system is operating properly.
